equivalents_en: come from (this verb is irregular in that it does not usually occur

senses.definition_en: to come from (this verb is irregular in that it does not usually occur
senses.definition_dg: Kutoka phatu fulani. Neno hiri rinatumiwa kpwa njia ya pekee kpwa Chidigo.

examples.en: He comes from Msambweni village.
examples.sw: Anatoka kijiji cha Msambweni.

examples.en: Where are you from?
Upstream, "the place where the water is coming from"

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukahala au kuonyesa kpwa hali isiyokuwa hivyo.

examples.en: No, I did not say that.
examples.sw: La, sikusema hivyo.

senses.definition_dg: Pengine, ikiwezekana.

examples.en: Maybe you did not plant well
examples.sw: Labda tukipanda vizuri, tutapata mavuno mazuri.

senses.definition_en: to withhold, to deprive someone of something
senses.definition_dg: Kumnyima mutu chitu ambacho anastahili au anaronda.

examples.en: I have not been given sweets, I have been deprived of sweets
examples.sw: Nilinyimwa peremende na ndugu yangu.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mbere ya mwiri kahi ya shingo na tumbo. Kifua.

examples.en: His chest hurts after running.
examples.sw: Kifua kinamuma baada ya kukimbia.

senses.definition_en: to say goodbye, to bid farewell, to take one's leave
senses.definition_dg: Kuambira mutu kwa heri kabla ya kutsama.

examples.dg: Walaga ise na nine kabla ya kuphiya.
examples.en: He said goodbye to his father and mother before leaving.
examples.sw: Aliaga baba na mama yake kabla ya kuondoka.

senses.definition_dg: Kuamba kpwa mutu utu ambawo undahenda badaye. Kuahidi.

examples.en: He promised the people that he would return.
examples.sw: Aliahidi watu kwamba atarudi.

senses.definition_dg: Mapatano kahi ya atu airi au zaidi. Ahadi ya pande zosi.

examples.dg: Lagano ra Mlungu na atu ni ra kare na kare.
examples.en: God's covenant with people is forever.
examples.sw: Agano la Mungu na watu ni la milele.

senses.definition_dg: Kuambira mutu ahende chitu kpwa mamlaka. Kuamuru.

examples.en: The chief ordered the people to work.
examples.sw: Chifu aliamuru watu wafanye kazi.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra mamlaka rinaloambirwa mutu ili alitimize. Amri.

examples.dg: Lagizo ra Mlungu ni lazima ritimizwe.
examples.en: God's command must be fulfilled.
examples.sw: Amri ya Mungu lazima itimizwe.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsupha mgulu kpwa nguvu na kugongana na chitu au mutu. Teke.

examples.dg: Wavigira lago ra mpira na kuphiga goli.
examples.en: He kicked the ball and scored a goal.
examples.sw: Alipiga teke la mpira na kufunga goli.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphoza mutu ariye na ugonjwa kpwa dawa. Kuagua.

examples.dg: (See: ngata) Laika1 spirit which affects children, reducing appetite and strength
examples.en: Appeasement of this kind of spirit is performed at the lake or pond where it possessed its victim
examples.sw: Mganga alimtibu mtu yule na akapona.

senses.definition_dg: Pepo ambaye anagbwira anache adide na kupunguza hamu ya kurya na nguvu.

examples.en: The child has the laika spirit; take him to the healer.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana pepo ya laika; mpeleke kwa mganga.

senses.definition_dg: Mwana mdide mchanga (neno risirotumiwa sana).

examples.dg: Laika ni neno ra kare ra mwana mchanga.
examples.en: Laika is an old word for infant.
examples.sw: Laika ni neno la zamani la mtoto mchanga.

senses.definition_dg: Nyere ndide-ndide za mwirini ambazo si za sehemu za siri.

examples.en: This arm has a lot of body hair.
examples.sw: Mkono huu una laika nyingi.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chenye uso mzuri usio na mikwaruzo au ukomavu.

examples.dg: Ngozi ya mwana mdide ni laini sana.
examples.en: A baby's skin is very smooth.
examples.sw: Ngozi ya mtoto mdogo ni laini sana.

senses.definition_en: to smoothe, to make something smooth
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chikale laini na chizuri.

examples.en: She applied oil on her skin to make it smooth.
examples.sw: Alijipaka mafuta ngozini ili ailainishe.

equivalents_en: voice (in the sense of the voice of a person which is identifyable by

senses.definition_en: voice (in the sense of the voice of a person which is identifyable by
senses.definition_dg: Sauti ya mutu ambayo inamanyikana kpwa kumsikira tu.

examples.dg: Nikamanya laka ra mwanangu hata kula kure.
examples.en: I recognized my child's voice even from far away.
examples.sw: Nilimtambua mtoto wangu kwa sauti hata kutoka mbali.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari mia mwenga elfu — 100,000.

examples.en: That goat was sold for two hundred thousand.
examples.sw: Mbuzi yule aliuzwa laki mbili.

equivalents_en: neno kama mkpware wakati wanjina rina mana ya mutu amendzaye achetu

senses.definition_en: neno kama mkpware wakati wanjina rina mana ya mutu amendzaye achetu
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuzungusha mana, dza mkpware. Wakati wanjina rinaonyesa mutu amendzaye achetu zaidi ya mmwenga.

examples.dg: Mutu iye ni lakini — ana achetu anji.
examples.en: That person is a womanizer — he has many women.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni mkware — ana wanawake wengi.

senses.definition_en: on his or her own, individually
senses.definition_dg: Kpwa phakpwe mwenye, bila mutu munjina. Peke yakpwe.

examples.dg: Huphozere asena ehu osi hiko, chila mmwenga lakpwe
examples.en: Greet all our friends there, each one individually
examples.sw: Tutumie rafiki zetu huko, kila mmoja peke yake.

senses.definition_dg: Dziwe kulu ambacho rinatumiwa kusagia unga au nafaka.

examples.en: Mother is grinding flour with a grinding stone.
examples.sw: Mama anasaga unga kwa lala.

senses.definition_dg: Kulaza mwiri tsini na kufunga matso ili kuphumzika au kulala usingizi.

examples.en: His words do not sleep (i.e
examples.sw: Maneno yake hayalali (maana: maneno yake hutimia) — methali ya Kidigo.

sub_entries.definition_en: lavu nono to have good luck

senses.definition_en: to plead, to complain, to beg for mercy
senses.definition_dg: Kuvoya na kuomba-omba msamaha au msada kpwa huzuni.

examples.dg: Walalama mbere za chifu ili asamehwe.
examples.en: He pleaded before the chief so he would be forgiven.
examples.sw: Alilalamika mbele ya chifu ili asamehwe.

senses.definition_dg: Mulume na mchetu kushiriki ngono.

examples.dg: Mulume na mkpwaziye analalan kpwa faragha.
examples.en: A man and his wife have intercourse in privacy.
examples.sw: Mume na mke wake hujamiana kwa faragha.

senses.definition_dg: Mudzi au phatu ambapho atu anaishi phamwenga.

examples.dg: Lalo rehu ni dide ela atu a phano anapendzana.
examples.en: Our village is small but the people here love each other.
examples.sw: Kijiji chetu ni kidogo lakini watu hapa wanapendana.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiya rurimi kondze na kugusa chitu kpwa rurimi.

examples.en: An empty finger is not licked
examples.sw: Kidole kitupu hakinyonyewi — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuisha kulala na kuphaha fahamu.

examples.en: "How have you woken up?"
examples.sw: Niliamka asubuhi mapema.

senses.definition_dg: Kurya chakurya cha kpwandza ligundzu bada ya kulamuka.

examples.en: I had tea and bread for breakfast.
examples.sw: Nilifungua kinywa kwa chai na mkate.

senses.definition_dg: Kumgombeza mutu neno ra heri ukimkutana naye.

examples.en: When people meet each other it is important to greet one another
examples.sw: Watu wanapokutana ni muhimu kusalimiana.

senses.definition_en: to awaken someone, to wake somebody up
senses.definition_dg: Kumusha mutu kula usingizini.

examples.en: Mother woke me up early in the morning.
examples.sw: Mama aliniamsha asubuhi mapema.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno mabii yanayoambirwa mutu ili mambo gakale mabaya kpwa maisha yakpwe.

examples.dg: Lana ya mutu mzee ni ya hatari.
examples.en: An elder's curse is dangerous.
examples.sw: Laana ya mzee ni hatari.

senses.definition_dg: Kuamba maneno mabii ili mutu ahendwe mabaya.

examples.en: Don't curse a person; God is the one who judges.
examples.sw: Usilaani mtu; Mungu ndiye ahukumuye.

senses.definition_en: to swear an oath, also mentioning your parent's siblings after you
senses.definition_dg: Kuapa kpwa nguvu, na wakati wanjina kuika milatso ya ndugu zako kpwa ahadi.

examples.dg: Walapha kpwa dzina ra ise kala anagomba kpweli.
examples.en: He swore an oath on his father's name that he was telling the truth.
examples.sw: Aliapa kwa jina la baba yake kwamba anasema kweli.

sub_entries.definition_en: order to bless them (a Digo custom)

senses.definition_dg: Kuambira mutu maneno mabii ili kumuumiza moyo. Kutukana.

examples.en: Don't insult a person; it is a sin.
examples.sw: Usitukane mtu; ni dhambi.

senses.definition_en: to joke with someone using mock insults
senses.definition_dg: Kuchezea mutu kpwa maneno ga mzaha ambago si ga kpweli.

examples.en: The friends joke with each other using mock insults for fun.
examples.sw: Marafiki wanachezana kwa maneno ya mzaha.

senses.definition_en: to release or shoot an arrow, hence to hit a target
senses.definition_dg: Kuphiga uha na kulavya mshale, au kupiga lengo.

examples.en: He shot an arrow and hit the animal.
examples.sw: Alipiga mshale na kumpata mnyama.

equivalents_en: lichemi kuchoma. Hondza tarikalatsa. The arrow missed (did not hit)

senses.definition_en: lichemi kuchoma. Hondza tarikalatsa. The arrow missed (did not hit)
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaelezera mshale uriolatsiwa. Angaliya latsa.

examples.en: The arrow missed — it did not hit the target.
examples.sw: Mshale haukupiga — haukufika lengo.

senses.definition_dg: Kutokukubaliana kpwa maneno au kpwa sheria.

examples.dg: Ana lau na jirani kuhusu mpaka wa munda.
examples.en: He has a dispute with his neighbour about the farm boundary.
examples.sw: Ana mashtaka na jirani kuhusu mpaka wa shamba.

senses.definition_en: to criticise, to blame, to accuse, to condemn
senses.definition_dg: Kuambira mutu kala makosa ni gakpwe. Kuheya mutu.

examples.dg: Usimlaumu mutu kabla hukasikira maneno gakpwe.
examples.en: Don't blame a person before you hear their side.
examples.sw: Usimlaumu mtu kabla hujasikia maneno yake.

senses.definition_dg: Mfupha wa ubavu wa mutu au nyama. Uphande wa mwiri.

examples.en: His right side rib is hurting.
examples.sw: Mbavu ya kulia inamuma.

equivalents_en: respond or answer (to a question or in a song)

senses.definition_en: to respond or answer (to a question or in a song)
senses.definition_dg: Kujibu swali au kuitikiya kpwa wimbo.

examples.en: He answered the teacher's question quickly.
examples.sw: Alijibu swali la mwalimu haraka.

senses.definition_dg: Kupha mutu chitu au kutoa chitu.

examples.en: He will give a lot of money
examples.sw: Atatoa pesa nyingi kwa msaada.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ga kuheya au kuonyesa makosa ga mutu. Kosa.

examples.dg: Kana lawama yoyosi kpwa kazi yake.
examples.en: He has no blame for his work.
examples.sw: Hana lawama yoyote kwa kazi yake.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya tsini ya mgulu ambayo inakanyaga ardhini.

examples.en: The sole of my foot is hurting.
examples.sw: Wayo wa mguu wangu unaumia.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki mwembamba wa baharini.

examples.dg: Layo ni samaki wa baharini ariye mwembamba.
examples.en: Layo is a flat fish from the sea.
examples.sw: Layo ni samaki bapa wa baharini.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda mutu au mwana alale.

examples.en: The mother is putting her small child to sleep.
examples.sw: Mama analaza mtoto wake mdogo.

senses.definition_dg: Wazi, kuikpwa wazi. Kukala mlango au chitu chikafungulwa.

examples.en: The door is wide open; just enter.
examples.sw: Mlango uko wazi; ingia tu.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba wazi-wazi bila kuficha chochosi.

examples.dg: Wagomba laza-laza maneno ga kpweli mbere za atu osi.
examples.en: He spoke openly the truth before everyone.
examples.sw: Alisema waziwazi maneno ya kweli mbele ya watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Ni muhimu kuhenda, hakuna njia yanjina.

examples.en: You must go to school today.
examples.sw: Lazima uende shule leo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda mutu ahende chitu asichoronda kpwa nguvu.

examples.en: Don't force someone who doesn't want to.
examples.sw: Usilazimishe mtu asiyetaka.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya limbwisa matso.

examples.dg: Legeza matso ni sawa na limbwisa matso.
examples.en: Legeza matso means to flutter one's eyelids.
examples.sw: Legeza matso ni sawa na limbwisa matso.

senses.definition_en: to point at, to steer towards, to face
senses.definition_dg: Kuonyesa njira kpwa chala au kuangaliya uphande fulani.

examples.en: He pointed towards the sea.
examples.sw: Alielekeza kidole upande wa bahari.

equivalents_en: speak without giving another a chance to do so
equivalents_sw: kusema bila kumpa mwengine nafasi ya kufanya hivyo

senses.definition_en: to speak without giving another a chance to do so
senses.definition_sw: kusema bila kumpa mwengine nafasi ya kufanya hivyo
senses.definition_dg: Kugomba-gomba bila kupha mutu munjina nafasi ya kugomba.

examples.dg: Usileleje; pha na anjina nafasi ya kugomba.
examples.en: Don't monopolize the conversation; give others a chance to speak too.
examples.sw: Usiseme peke yako; wape na wengine nafasi ya kuzungumza.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya na kupanga kuphiga lengo.

examples.en: He aimed well and shot the arrow.
examples.sw: Alilenga vizuri na akapiga mshale.

senses.definition_dg: Kujaa hadi pomoni, kujaa kabisa.

examples.en: The bucket is filled to the brim with water.
examples.sw: Ndoo imejaa maji pomoni.

senses.definition_dg: Kupata mapatano bada ya malumbano. Kuridhiana.

examples.en: After the arguments, they came to a compromise.
examples.sw: Baada ya malumbano, waliridhiana.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala chitu chimwenga chinaangaliya chitu chanjina, phatu phiri phinalengana.

examples.dg: Nyumba yangu na nyumba ya Salimu zinalengana
examples.en: My house is opposite Salimu's house
examples.sw: Nyumba yangu na nyumba ya Salimu zinaangaliana.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho mutu analonda kufikira au kutimiza.

examples.dg: Lengo rangu ni kufundza anache kusoma.
examples.en: My goal is to teach children to read.
examples.sw: Lengo langu ni kuwafundisha watoto kusoma.

equivalents_en: colourful printed cloths containing a proverb or saying

senses.definition_en: colourful printed cloths containing a proverb or saying, worn by women
senses.definition_dg: Nguo ya rangi nono yenye maneno ya msemo au methali ambayo achetu anavwala.

examples.dg: Mayo wavwala leso nono ya rangi ya kijani.
examples.en: Mother wore a beautiful green printed cloth.
examples.sw: Mama alivaa leso nzuri ya rangi ya kijani.

senses.definition_dg: Kunwa uchi munji hadi kutsahautsahau na kukala bila achili.

examples.en: After drinking too much alcohol, he got drunk.
examples.sw: Baada ya kunywa pombe nyingi, alilewa.

senses.definition_dg: Tamaa ya ngono, hamu ya kushiriki mambo ga uzinifu.

examples.dg: Libando ni chitu kibaya ambacho kinahasiri atu.
examples.en: Sexual lust is a bad thing that ruins people.
examples.sw: Ukware ni kitu kibaya kinachoharibu watu.

senses.definition_dg: Chitswa cha muhi chirichokatwa na kunyooshwa. Ubao.

examples.dg: Fundi wahala mabao kpwa kutengeneza meza.
examples.en: The carpenter took pieces of wood to make a table.
examples.sw: Fundi alichukua mbao kutengeneza meza.

equivalents_en: a kind of creeper usually found in forests

senses.definition_en: a kind of creeper usually found in forests
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mimea inayoremba kpwa mihi tsakani.

examples.en: The creeper spreads on the trees in the forest.
examples.sw: Mzabibu wa porini unaenea kwa miti msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyuni ambaye anaimba usiku, ana sauti nono.

examples.en: The nightjar calls throughout the night.
examples.sw: Pwaju analia usiku kucha.

senses.definition_en: , kukota                                                    likarare lichemi, kukota to shout
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga kelele kpwa sauti ya dzulu.

examples.en: She shouted when she saw a snake.
examples.sw: Alipiga kelele alipoona nyoka.

senses.definition_dg: Udanganyifu na hila za kudanga mutu.

examples.dg: Usimkubali mutu iye; ana machengo manji.
examples.en: Don't believe that person; he has many tricks.
examples.sw: Usimamini mtu yule; ana hila nyingi.

equivalents_en: (chezi-chezi) tickly cough caused by chewing something oily

senses.definition_en: (chezi-chezi) tickly cough caused by chewing something oily
senses.definition_dg: Kukohola kukusababishiwa ni kurya chitu chenye mafuha, ambacho chunatikisa koo.

examples.dg: Nina lichezi-chezi bada ya kurya karanga.
examples.en: I have a tickly cough after eating peanuts.
examples.sw: Nina kikohozi cha kutikisa baada ya kula karanga.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kikohozi kinachosababishwa na kutafuna vitu vya mafuta kama nazi

senses.definition_dg: Uzio au mpaka wa munda au nyumba.

examples.en: Eyes have no boundary
examples.sw: Macho hayana ukigo — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Udanganyifu, handzo, maneno ambago si ga kpweli.

examples.en: He is dishonest/full of crap; don't belive him
examples.sw: Ana udanganyifu; usimfuate.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyasi ambazo zinamera kondeni.

examples.en: That species of grass spreads in the farm quickly.
examples.sw: Aina hiyo ya nyasi inaenea shambani haraka.

senses.definition_dg: Tamaa ya ngono.

examples.dg: Lifyaku ni chitu ambacho chinahasiri atu anji.
examples.en: Sexual desire is something that ruins many people.
examples.sw: Tamaa ya ngono ni kitu kinachoharibu watu wengi.

senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa tumbo unaohenda mutu aphiye msalani mara kpwa mara na madzi.

examples.en: The child has diarrhoea; take him to the hospital.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana mharisho; mpeleke hospitali.

equivalents_en: small stick used for sharpening knives

senses.definition_en: small stick used for sharpening knives
senses.definition_dg: Fimbo ndide inayotumiwa kutiya chisu makali.

examples.en: He took the sharpening stick to sharpen the knife.
examples.sw: Alichukua fimbo ya kunoa kisu.

senses.definition_dg: Bakuli ra udongo wa ulongo.

examples.en: My clay bowl has water (in it)
examples.sw: Bakuli langu la udongo lina maji.

equivalents_sw: aina ya nyoka wa rangi ya kijani mwenye sumu na uwezo wa kurukaruka

senses.definition_en: green mamba, kind of poisonous snake (Dendroaspis angusticeps)
senses.definition_sw: aina ya nyoka wa rangi ya kijani mwenye sumu na uwezo wa kurukaruka
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyoka wa rangi ya kijani ambaye ana sumu kali na anaweza kurukaruka.

examples.dg: Liga-lakanga ni nyoka wa hatari sana; ukimuona uka kure.
examples.en: The green mamba is a very dangerous snake; if you see it, go far away.
examples.sw: Nyoka wa kijani mwenye sumu ni hatari sana; ukimwona ondoka mbali.

senses.definition_dg: Wakati wa kare sana kabla ya dzuwa kutsuka. Alfajiri.

examples.en: Tomorrow I have to wake up at dawn
examples.sw: Kesho lazima niamke alfajiri.

senses.definition_dg: Tamaa ya ngono, hamu mbii ya mwiri.

examples.en: Sexual lust is a bad thing; control yourself.
examples.sw: Tamaa ya mwili ni kitu kibaya; jizuie.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya likpwadzu.

examples.dg: Ligbwadzu ni neno ranjina ra likpwadzu.
examples.en: Ligbwadzu is another word for likpwadzu (tamarind fruit).
examples.sw: Ligbwadzu ni neno lingine la likpwadzu (ukwaju).

senses.definition_dg: Wakati wa kpwandza bada ya kucha hadi muhana.

examples.dg: Nilamuka ligundzu mapema kpwa kuphiya kazini.
examples.en: I woke up in the morning early to go to work.
examples.sw: Niliamka asubuhi mapema kwenda kazini.

senses.definition_en: deceitfulness, a lie, a falsehood, an untruth
senses.definition_dg: Maneno ambago si ga kpweli, udanganyifu. Handzo.

examples.en: Don't tell me lies; I want the truth.
examples.sw: Usiniambie uongo; nataka ukweli.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya laini ya dzulu ya chitswa cha mwana mchanga. Utosi.

examples.en: Don't touch the fontanel of a newborn.
examples.sw: Usishike utosi wa mtoto mchanga.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda dza mutu munjina, kumuiga.

examples.dg: Liigizo ra mutu munjina si nono; kala mwenye.
examples.en: Imitating another person is not good; be yourself.
examples.sw: Kuiga mtu mwingine si vizuri; kuwa mwenyewe.

senses.definition_dg: Kuigisha-igisha mutu munjina, kumuiga mara kpwa mara.

examples.dg: Anache anahenda liigo-igo ra mwalimu — anammuiga.
examples.en: The children are imitating the teacher — copying him.
examples.sw: Watoto wanafanya mwigo wa mwalimu — wanamwiga.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba maneno manono kuhusu mutu au chitu. Kusifu.

examples.dg: Chifu wakala na mkutano dzana na achialika atu sana
examples.en: Yesterday the chief had a meeting and he praised the people very much
examples.sw: Chifu alikuwa na mkutano jana na aliwapongeza watu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kukaidi na kusironda kukubali neno.

examples.en: That child is stubborn; he doesn't listen.
examples.sw: Mtoto yule ni mkaidi; hasikii.

equivalents_en: woven palm frond used as a mat

senses.definition_en: woven palm frond used as a mat
senses.definition_dg: Chitu chirichofumwa kpwa makodza ga mnazi ambacho chinatumiwa dza mkeka.

examples.en: I sat on a palm mat on the ground.
examples.sw: Nilikaa juu ya kanja chini.

senses.definition_dg: Tabia ya kukaidi na kudumu kpwa uamuzi wako bila kubadilika.

examples.en: He is stubborn; he won't change his mind.
examples.sw: Ana ukaidi; hatabadili nia.

equivalents_en: onset of a new season (especially rains)

senses.definition_en: onset of a new season (especially rains)
senses.definition_dg: Mwandzo wa msimu muphya, hasa wa mvula.

examples.dg: Hiri ni likarare ra mvula; hundaandza kurima.
examples.en: This is the onset of the rains; we will start farming.
examples.sw: Huu ni mwanzo wa mvua; tutaanza kulima.

equivalents_en: limbiti-mbiti n'likarare ra vuri. Now is the onset of the short rains

senses.definition_en: limbiti-mbiti n'likarare ra vuri. Now is the onset of the short rains
senses.definition_dg: Angaliya likarare — mwandzo wa msimu.

examples.en: Likehe is the same as likarare (onset of season).
examples.sw: Likehe ni sawa na likarare (mwanzo wa majira).

senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa mapafu unaohenda mutu akoholere sana na kupungukiwa ni mwiri.

examples.dg: Likehe ni ukongo ambao unagbwira mapafu na kumhenda mutu akolole sana
examples.en: Tuberculosis is an illness which affects the lungs and makes a person cough a lot
examples.sw: Kifua kikuu ni ugonjwa unaogusa mapafu na kumfanya mtu akohoe sana.

senses.definition_dg: Siku za kuphumzika kula kazini au skulini.

examples.dg: Anache ana likizo ya mwezi mmwenga.
examples.en: The children have a one-month holiday.
examples.sw: Watoto wana likizo ya mwezi mmoja.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ngumu ya dzulu ya chala cha mkono au mgulu.

examples.en: My fingernail broke.
examples.sw: Ukucha wa kidole changu ulivunjika.

senses.definition_dg: Nyere ambazo ni za kupiringana kidogo tu, si za kunjika wala kunyooha.

examples.dg: Ana nyere za likophya, si za kukunjika.
examples.en: She has loosely curled, wavy hair, not tight curls.
examples.sw: Ana nywele za mawimbi, si za kusokoteka sana.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu phenye uhereza, phatu pha kutserera.

examples.dg: Phatu hipho phana likosi; nyendeka kpwa makini.
examples.en: That place is slippery; walk carefully.
examples.sw: Mahali hapo pana utelezi; tembea kwa makini.

equivalents_en: madzi ga water with a film of dirt on the surface

senses.definition_en: , madzi ga water with a film of dirt on the surface
senses.definition_dg: Madzi ambago gana uchafu juu ya uso, utandu.

examples.dg: Madzi gana likosi; ganuka gakale kpweli.
examples.en: The water has a dirty film on the surface; change it to be clean.
examples.sw: Maji yana utandu mchafu juu; yabadilishe yawe safi.

senses.definition_dg: Kamba ya kupigbwa au kufungira vitu.

examples.en: Tie this bag with a rope.
examples.sw: Funga mfuko huu kwa kamba.

senses.definition_dg: Tunda ra muhi wa mkpwadzu. Rina ladha ya uchuchu.

examples.dg: Likpwadzu rinatumiwa kupika na kutengeza kinywaji.
examples.en: Tamarind fruit is used for cooking and making drinks.
examples.sw: Ukwaju hutumika kupikia na kutengeneza kinywaji.

senses.definition_dg: Kitseko kikulu cha furaha.

examples.en: He burst out laughing when he heard the good news.
examples.sw: Alipiga kicheko cha furaha aliposikia habari njema.

senses.definition_dg: Tamaa ya ngono.

examples.dg: Likpwale ni chitu ambacho kinahasiri atu.
examples.en: Sexual lust is something that ruins people.
examples.sw: Tamaa ya mwili ni kitu kinachoharibu watu.

senses.definition_dg: Kitseko kikulu cha kuamsha na furaha.

examples.en: He laughed so loudly that he had tears.
examples.sw: Alicheka kwa sauti hadi akatoa machozi.

senses.definition_dg: Sauti kulu za atu au vitu. Kelele.

examples.en: The children's noise is disturbing me.
examples.sw: Kelele za watoto zinanisumbua.

senses.definition_dg: Chitswa chimwenga cha kuni ambacho chinatumiwa kupikira.

examples.en: Bring one piece of firewood for cooking.
examples.sw: Leta kuni moja kwa kupikia.

equivalents_en: (kushe-kushe) large group of people or animals standing or

senses.definition_en: (kushe-kushe) large group of people or animals standing or
senses.definition_dg: Kundi kulu ra atu au nyama ariosimama au ariotanyika phatu phwenga.

examples.dg: Kuna likushe-kushe ra atu sokoni rero.
examples.en: There is a large crowd of people at the market today.
examples.sw: Kuna kundi kubwa la watu sokoni leo.

sub_entries.definition_sw: umati wa watu au wanyama waliosimama au wanaotembea pamoja

examples.en: I have seen a large column of safari ants coming

senses.definition_dg: Chiungo cha ndani ya kano ambacho chinatumiwa kuonja na kugomba. Rurimi.

examples.dg: Lilaka rangu rwaphya kpwa chakurya cha moho.
examples.en: My tongue was burnt by hot food.
examples.sw: Ulimi wangu uliungua kwa chakula cha moto.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya dzulu ya ndani ya kano. Kaakaa.

examples.en: The palate in my mouth is hurting.
examples.sw: Kaakaa ndani ya kinywa changu kinaumia.

senses.definition_dg: Chitswa ambacho hakina nyere, kipara.

examples.dg: Baba ana lilazi dzulu ya chitswache.
examples.en: Father has a bald head on top of his head.
examples.sw: Baba ana upaa juu ya kichwa chake.

senses.definition_dg: Kufikiri kuhusu mutu au jambo.

examples.en: I am thinking about my teacher's words.
examples.sw: Ninafikiria maneno ya mwalimu wangu.

senses.definition_dg: Rurimi, chiungo cha ndani ya kano. Sawa na lilaka au ruraka.

examples.dg: Lilimi ni neno ranjina ra rurimi.
examples.en: Lilimi is another word for tongue.
examples.sw: Lilimi ni neno lingine la ulimi.

equivalents_en: enter into an agreement to play a certain game (used mainly of children)
equivalents_sw: kuwa na mkataba fulani juu ya mchezo

senses.definition_en: to enter into an agreement to play a certain game (used mainly of children)
senses.definition_sw: kuwa na mkataba fulani juu ya mchezo
senses.definition_dg: Kupatana na kuhenda mkataba wa kucheza mchezo fulani, hasa kpwa anache.

examples.dg: Nkakubakula kpwa hivyo kalamu hino ni yangu kpwa sababu waliliyana
examples.en: I hit your hand so this pen (which you dropped) becomes mine, for we agreed to play that game
examples.sw: Nilishinda kwa hivyo kalamu hii ni yangu kwa sababu tulikubaliana.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinatumiwa kpwa kuandza maneno ganjina au kuambira mutu.

examples.dg: Lilungalo ni neno ra kisarufi ra Chidigo.
examples.en: Lilungalo is a grammatical term in Digo.
examples.sw: Lilungalo ni neno la kisarufi la Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya limbwisa matso.

examples.dg: Limbwisa ni neno rinatumiwa phamwenga na 'matso'.
examples.en: Limbwisa is used together with 'matso' (eyes).
examples.sw: Limbwisa hutumika pamoja na 'matso' (macho).

equivalents_sw: kulegeza macho katika hali ya kuonyesha huba au mapenzi

senses.definition_en: matso to flutter one's eyelids, to make eyes at someone
senses.definition_sw: kulegeza macho katika hali ya kuonyesha huba au mapenzi
senses.definition_dg: Kufumbisa na kufungula matso kpwa haraka ili kuonyesha mutu mapenzi au hamu.

examples.dg: Mwanache walimbwisa matso achimona mwanache yuno.
examples.en: The young man fluttered his eyelids when he saw that young woman.
examples.sw: Kijana alilegeza macho alipomuona yule binti.

senses.definition_dg: Muanga wa nguvu unaphenya wakati wa mvula na radi. Umeme.

examples.en: Lightning struck the tree and burnt it.
examples.sw: Umeme ulipiga mti na kuuunguza.

senses.definition_dg: Mara mwenga, phatu phwenga kpwa wakati mmwenga.

examples.en: He did everything at once.
examples.sw: Alifanya mambo yote mara moja.

equivalents_en: trap dug in the ground to catch animals

senses.definition_en: trap dug in the ground to catch animals
senses.definition_dg: Shimo rinarochimbwa ardhini kpwa kunasira nyama. Mtego wa shimo.

examples.dg: Nyama wagbwa kpwa lina ririchochimbwa tsakani.
examples.en: The animal fell into the trap dug in the bush.
examples.sw: Mnyama alianguka shimoni lililochimbwa porini.

equivalents_en: (ng'ongo) a strip of palm leaf used (for example) for tying palm

senses.definition_en: (ng'ongo) a strip of palm leaf used (for example) for tying palm
senses.definition_dg: Ukanda wa kodza ra mnazi ambao unatumiwa kufungira vitu.

examples.en: Tie these firewood sticks with a palm leaf strip.
examples.sw: Funga kuni hizi kwa ukili wa mnazi.

sub_entries.definition_en: a stick to make sections of palm thatch

senses.definition_dg: Kukunja chitu dza kamba au uzi kuzungulusha.

examples.dg: Walinga kamba vizuri na kuiika phatu phakpwe.
examples.en: He wound up the rope well and put it in its place.
examples.sw: Alikunja kamba vizuri na kuiweka mahali pake.

senses.definition_en: to wrap around (e.g. creeper, vine, snake)
senses.definition_dg: Kuzungulusha chitu dza mmea unaoremba au nyoka.

examples.en: The snake wrapped around the tree.
examples.sw: Nyoka alifunga mti.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzungulusha phatu fulani, kuphima phatu kuzungulusha.

examples.en: The enemies surrounded the village.
examples.sw: Maadui walizingira kijiji.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya vitu viiri au zaidi na kuona ni phani vinafwanana au kutafautiana.

examples.dg: Linganisha bei ya maduka mairi kabla ya kugura.
examples.en: Compare the prices of two shops before buying.
examples.sw: Linganisha bei za maduka mawili kabla ya kununua.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala umezungulushwa kpwa pande zosi.

examples.en: The village was surrounded by enemies.
examples.sw: Kijiji kilizingirwa na maadui.

senses.definition_dg: Kukaza chitu sana hadi chikale chigumu kufungulwa.

examples.dg: Walingita fundo hadi ikakala ngumu kuvugula.
examples.en: He tightened the knot until it was hard to untie.
examples.sw: Alikaza fundo hadi ikawa ngumu kufungua.

senses.definition_dg: Ziwa ra mchetu ambaro rinatoa maziya. Titi.

examples.en: The baby is suckling its mother's breast.
examples.sw: Mtoto ananyonya titi la mama yake.

senses.definition_dg: Chitswa chimwenga cha nyasi.

examples.en: He took one blade of grass and held it.
examples.sw: Alichukua nyasi moja na kuishika.

senses.definition_dg: Rangi ya kijani, sawa na rangi ya nyasi.

examples.dg: Nyumba iyo ina rangi ya linyasi.
examples.en: That house has a green colour.
examples.sw: Nyumba ile ina rangi ya kijani.

senses.definition_dg: Nyere mwenga ya kitswani.

examples.dg: Wakuna linyere rimwenga ra nyere nyire kitswache.
examples.en: He plucked one strand of grey hair from his head.
examples.sw: Alingʼoa nywele moja nyeupe kichwani.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chilaini ambacho chinamera mwirini mwa nyuni.

examples.dg: Linyoya ra dzogoo rina rangi nono.
examples.en: The cock's feather has a beautiful colour.
examples.sw: Nyoya ya jogoo ina rangi nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chigumu kinachomera kitswani kpwa ng'ombe au nyama anjina.

examples.en: That cow has long horns.
examples.sw: Ngʼombe yule ana pembe ndefu.

senses.definition_dg: Tamaa ya ngono, hamu mbii ya mwiri.

examples.dg: Liphayo ni chitu ambacho lazima mutu adzishinde.
examples.en: Sexual desire is something a person must overcome.
examples.sw: Tamaa ya mwili ni kitu ambacho mtu lazima ajizuie.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kutendzia chakurya dza mchuzi na kupagira sahanini. Upawa.

examples.en: Our ladle has a short handle
examples.sw: Upawa wetu una mpini mfupi.

senses.definition_dg: Pembe ya nyama (neno ra kare). Sawa na lipembe.

examples.dg: Liphembe ni neno ra kare ra pembe.
examples.en: Liphembe is an old word for horn.
examples.sw: Liphembe ni neno la zamani la pembe.

equivalents_sw: traditional item used to draw water

senses.definition_sw: traditional item used to draw water
senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kutendzia madzi au chakurya cha majimaji.

examples.en: Take the dipper and scoop water.
examples.sw: Chukua upawa ukachote maji.

senses.definition_dg: Kitawi kidide cha muhi au kipande cha muhi kinachopandwa.

examples.dg: Panda liphungo hiri ili rimewe muhi.
examples.en: Plant this cutting so it grows into a tree.
examples.sw: Panda kipandikizi hiki ili kiote kuwa mti.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kuphyerera uchafu ndani ya nyumba au kondze. Fagio.

examples.en: Take the broom and sweep the house.
examples.sw: Chukua fagio ufagie nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Chitswa chembamba cha muhi.

examples.dg: Wahala lipwapwi ra muhi kuhenda fimbo.
examples.en: He took a thin piece of wood to make a stick.
examples.sw: Alichukua kipande chembamba cha mti kutengeneza fimbo.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno mabii yanayogombwa kuhusu mutu asiyekuwapo. Kashifa.

examples.en: Don't spread slander about your neighbours.
examples.sw: Usieneze kashifa kuhusu jirani zako.

senses.definition_dg: Kamba iliyofumwa. Ukili.

examples.en: Tie this bag with a woven rope.
examples.sw: Funga mfuko huu kwa ukili.

senses.definition_dg: Chakurya ambacho ni kitamu sana kuriko cha kawaida.

examples.dg: Chakurya hichi ni lisuna — kitamu kupita kawaida!
examples.en: This food is especially tasty — delicious beyond the ordinary!
examples.sw: Chakula hiki ni kitamu — tamu kupita kawaida!

equivalents_en: bed made with the branches of a coconut tree
equivalents_sw: kitanda kinachotengezwa na matawi ya mnazi

senses.definition_en: bed made with the branches of a coconut tree
senses.definition_sw: kitanda kinachotengezwa na matawi ya mnazi
senses.definition_dg: Chitanda chinahendwa kpwa matawi ga mnazi.

examples.dg: Buda nkukala atu analala dzulu ya litsaga.
examples.en: In the past people used to sleep on beds made of coconut branches.
examples.sw: Zamani watu walilala juu ya vitanda vya matawi ya mnazi.

senses.definition_en: hot sand, ground that has been warmed by the sun enough to burn
senses.definition_dg: Mtsanga wa moho ambao ukanyagwa unavyosa, uriophywa ni dzuwa.

examples.en: Don't walk without shoes — the hot sand burns.
examples.sw: Usitembee bila viatu — mchanga wa moto unaumia.

sub_entries.definition_sw: ardhi kuwa moto kwa sababu ya jua kali

examples.dg: Siweza kunyendeka magulu mahuphu kpwa sababu kuna litsapi
examples.en: I can't walk barefoot because the ground is too hot

equivalents_en: catch of fish which has been strung together

senses.definition_en: catch of fish which has been strung together
senses.definition_dg: Samaki ambao gakagbwirwa na kushonwa phamwenga kpwa kamba.

examples.dg: Wahala liungo ra samaki kula kpwa mvuvi.
examples.en: He took a string of fish from the fisherman.
examples.sw: Alichukua shazi la samaki kutoka kwa mvuvi.

senses.definition_en: attraction, the act of attracting of many
senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinachodzirehera atu au kudzihehera atu. Mvuto.

examples.dg: Livuho ra mudzi uhu ni lukore.
examples.en: The attraction of this village is the rainbow.
examples.sw: Mvuto wa kijiji hiki ni upinde wa mvua.

sub_entries.definition_sw: mganga ambaye hujihusisha na kutoa dawa ya kuvuta wanunuzi

equivalents_en: trap made from branches in the shape of a container

senses.definition_en: trap made from branches in the shape of a container, placed on the
senses.definition_dg: Mtego unaohendwa kpwa matawi kpwa sura ya chombo, unaoiswa kondze kpwa kunasa nyama.

examples.en: He set a trap in the bush to catch animals.
examples.sw: Aliweka mtego porini kunasa wanyama.

senses.definition_dg: Mkulu wa kuongoza eneo, gavana.

examples.dg: Liwali wa eneo hiri ni mutu wa haki.
examples.en: The governor of this area is a fair person.
examples.sw: Liwali wa eneo hili ni mtu wa haki.

senses.definition_dg: Kuzungusha chitu dza kamba au fimbo kuzungulusha.

examples.en: The child is swinging a rope around.
examples.sw: Mtoto anazungusha kamba.

senses.definition_dg: Kuosha chitu kpwa kuchimwagira madzi na kuchitikisa ili chisafe.

examples.dg: Liya-liya chupa iyo kpwa madzi masafi.
examples.en: Rinse out that bottle with clean water.
examples.sw: Suuza chupa hiyo kwa maji safi.

senses.definition_en: to bewitch, to cause someone harm through witchcraft
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda uchawi kpwa kuhasiri mutu kpwa njia za giza.

examples.dg: Mzee yuya waloga atu osi ili asikizwe
examples.en: That old person has bewitched everyone so that he will be obeyed
examples.sw: Mzee yule aliroga watu wote ili asikilizwe.

senses.definition_dg: Kuona vitu usingizini.

examples.en: He had a strange dream at night.
examples.sw: Aliota ndoto ya ajabu usiku.

senses.definition_dg: Kufikira phatu. Kufika.

examples.en: He arrived at his village in the evening.
examples.sw: Alifika kijiji chake jioni.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya chitu kpwa matso.

examples.dg: Lola uphande hura na uone rira.
examples.en: Look at that side and see what's there.
examples.sw: Angalia upande ule uone kuna nini.

equivalents_en: (lólwa ) be married (used of a woman getting married)

senses.definition_en: (lólwa ) be married (used of a woman getting married)
senses.definition_dg: Mchetu kuolerwa ni mulume.

examples.dg: Mwari walolwa ni mulume wa mudzi uhu.
examples.en: The girl was married by a man from this village.
examples.sw: Msichana aliozwa na mtu wa kijiji hiki.

senses.definition_dg: Ncha ya chitu, upande wa kumaliza ambawo ni wa kupigiza.

examples.dg: Lomba ra fimbo iyo ni kali.
examples.en: The pointed end of that stick is sharp.
examples.sw: Ncha ya fimbo ile ni kali.

senses.definition_dg: Kutaka chitu au kuhenda chitu.

examples.en: I want water, I am thirsty.
examples.sw: Nataka maji, nina kiu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuchongeza mutu na kumuhendesa ahende chitu kibaya.

examples.en: Don't incite another person to do bad things.
examples.sw: Usimchochee mtu mwingine mambo mabaya.

senses.definition_dg: Kuongoza atu na kuaonyesha njira.

examples.en: The elder led the people with wisdom.
examples.sw: Mzee aliongoza watu kwa busara.

senses.definition_en: to look for, to hope for
senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya kpwa makini na kutumainia.

examples.en: What you hoped for came to pass
examples.sw: Yale mliyokuwa mkitumainia yametimia.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya mchezo au tendo.

examples.en: Let's go to watch football.
examples.sw: Twende kutazama mpira.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mali ya kutosha, kukala tajiri kidogo.

examples.dg: Mutu iye analosa; ana mali ya kutosha.
examples.en: That person is fairly well off; he has enough wealth.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni tajiri wa wastani; ana mali ya kutosha.

equivalents_en: dream of a departed family member

senses.definition_en: to dream of a departed family member
senses.definition_dg: Kuloha ndosoni kuhusu mutu wa mbari ariyefwa.

examples.en: He dreamt of his deceased father last night.
examples.sw: Aliota baba yake aliyefariki usiku wa jana.

senses.definition_dg: Harufu mbii, kunuka vibaya.

examples.dg: Nyumba ina lovu ra samaki ariovunda.
examples.en: The house has a bad smell of rotten fish.
examples.sw: Nyumba ina harufu mbaya ya samaki waliooza.

senses.definition_dg: Kunuka vibaya, kutoa harufu mbii.

examples.en: That fish stinks.
examples.sw: Samaki yule ananuka mvundo.

equivalents_en: fish with a hook and line

senses.definition_en: to fish with a hook and line
senses.definition_dg: Kuvuwa samaki kpwa ndoano na uzi.

examples.en: Father is fishing with a hook and line in the river.
examples.sw: Baba anavua samaki mtoni.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chilaini ambacho chinamera mwirini mwa nyuni. Nyoya.

examples.en: That bird has beautiful feathers.
examples.sw: Ndege yule ana manyoya mazuri.

equivalents_en: make something face in a certain direction

senses.definition_en: to make something face in a certain direction, to orientate something
senses.definition_dg: Kuonyesha chitu njira, kuelekeza chitu uphande fulani.

examples.en: He oriented the house facing east.
examples.sw: Alielekeza nyumba upande wa mashariki.

senses.definition_dg: Kuoza mutu — mulume na mchetu kunikishwa kpwa kadhi au kasisi.

examples.en: The kadhi married two people yesterday.
examples.sw: Kadhi alioza watu wawili jana.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala utamu.

examples.en: The sweetness of today's mango is pleasing.
examples.sw: Utamu wa embe la leo unapendeza.

senses.definition_dg: Mwiri wa mutu au nyama ariyefwa. Mzoga.

examples.en: A carcass of an animal was found in the bush.
examples.sw: Mzoga wa mnyama ulipatikana porini.

equivalents_en: lwama mwenga rikaphirikpwa nyumba ya kuika malufu. After the car accident one dead body was taken to the mortuary

senses.definition_en: lwama mwenga rikaphirikpwa nyumba ya kuika malufu. After the car accident one dead body was taken to the mortuary
senses.definition_dg: Mwiri wa mutu ariyefwa unaopelekpwa kuikpwa kpwa nyumba ya maiti.

examples.dg: Bada ya ajali, luga mwenga rikaphirikpwa nyumba ya kuika malufu.
examples.en: After the accident, one dead body was taken to the mortuary.
examples.sw: Baada ya ajali, maiti moja ilipelekwa chumba cha kuhifadhi maiti.

senses.definition_dg: Namna ya kugomba ya atu wa tsi fulani au kabila fulani.

examples.dg: Luga ya Chidigo ni nono sana.
examples.en: The Digo language is very beautiful.
examples.sw: Lugha ya Kidigo ni nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kamba ndide inayotumiwa kufungira vitu au uzi wa upinde.

examples.en: The bowstring broke.
examples.sw: Kamba ya upinde ilivunjika.

senses.definition_sw: also used of other thick, sticky liquids; ute
senses.definition_dg: Madzi ganagotoka kanoni, ute. Piya inatumiwa kpwa madzi ganjina ga kunata.

examples.dg: Mwana ana luhe kanoni — ana nyoha.
examples.en: The child has saliva in his mouth — he is thirsty.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana mate kinywani — ana kiu.

senses.definition_dg: Kukosa tamaa na kuona kala hakuna njia ya kuphaha msada.

examples.en: Don't despair; God has a way.
examples.sw: Usikata tamaa; Mungu ana njia.

equivalents_en: hydrocele: a kind of disease causing an enlarged scrotum

senses.definition_en: hydrocele: a kind of disease causing an enlarged scrotum
senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa unaohendesa sehemu ya siri ya mulume ikale kulu kpwa sababu ya madzi.

examples.dg: Luje ni ugonjwa wa mutu arisaye hospitali.
examples.en: Hydrocele is a condition that requires hospital treatment.
examples.sw: Pumbu ni ugonjwa unaohitaji matibabu ya hospitali.

senses.definition_dg: Rangi nyinji zinazonekana mainguni bada ya mvula kuisha.

examples.dg: Lukore rinaonekana bada ya mvula kuisha.
examples.en: A rainbow appears after the rain stops.
examples.sw: Upinde wa mvua unaonekana baada ya mvua kusimama.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhisi utsungu wa mwirini.

examples.en: My head is hurting a lot.
examples.sw: Kichwa changu kinaumia sana.

senses.definition_en: to argue, defend in legal sense in court
senses.definition_dg: Kukala kpwa kotini na kutetereza maneno gako au ga mutu munjina.

examples.dg: Wakili analumba kpwa niaba ya mwandalame.
examples.en: The lawyer is arguing in court on behalf of the accused.
examples.sw: Wakili analumba kwa niaba ya mshtakiwa.

senses.definition_dg: Atu airi au zaidi kugombana kpwa maneno.

examples.dg: Majirani analumbana kuhusu mpaka wa munda.
examples.en: The neighbours are arguing about the farm boundary.
examples.sw: Majirani wanalumbana kuhusu mpaka wa shamba.

senses.definition_dg: Malumbano au mashtaka kahi ya atu.

examples.dg: Lumbano ra majirani rikaisha kpwa amani.
examples.en: The neighbours' dispute ended peacefully.
examples.sw: Mashtaka ya majirani yalimalizika kwa amani.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama mdide ambaye anagaluza rangi yakpwe kpwa kulengana na phatu ariphokala. Kinyonga.

examples.en: A chameleon can change its colour
examples.sw: Kinyonga hubadilisha rangi yake.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda mutu ahisi utsungu wa mwirini au moyoni.

examples.en: Don't hurt someone with bad words.
examples.sw: Usimwumize mtu kwa maneno mabaya.

senses.definition_en: to fall ill, to be in pain
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na ugonjwa au utsungu wa mwiri.

examples.en: He is feeling ill with a headache today.
examples.sw: Anaumwa na kichwa leo.

senses.definition_dg: Mara mwenga, kpwa wakati mmwenga.

examples.en: Do those things all at once.
examples.sw: Fanya mambo hayo mara moja.

senses.definition_en: to join something to something else
senses.definition_dg: Kuunganisha chitu na chitu chanjina.

examples.en: He joined two ropes together to make one.
examples.sw: Aliunganisha kamba mbili ziwe moja.

senses.definition_en: to approach, to follow, to keep or abide by (law)
senses.definition_dg: Kulunga-lunga mutu au sheria, kufuata.

examples.en: Follow that road until you arrive.
examples.sw: Fuata njia hiyo hadi ufike.

senses.definition_en: to lengthen, e.g. by joining two items together
senses.definition_dg: Kurefusha chitu kpwa kuunganisha na chanjina.

examples.dg: Walungiza kamba kpwa kuiunganisha na yanjina.
examples.en: He lengthened the rope by joining it with another.
examples.sw: Alirefusha kamba kwa kuiunganisha na nyingine.

senses.definition_dg: Chifaa cha kuphehera nafaka ili kuzitanya na makumbi.

examples.dg: Tima ana lungo nono ra kuphehera matsere
examples.en: Tima has a good basket for winnowing maize
examples.sw: Bibi ana uteo mzuri wa kupepeta mchele.

equivalents_sw: aina ya samaki ambaye huishi mitoni

senses.definition_en: catfish: a kind of edible, bottom-feeding freshwater fish (Clarius anguillaris)
senses.definition_sw: aina ya samaki ambaye huishi mitoni
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki ambaye anaishi muhoni na kurya kula tsini.

examples.dg: Lungulungu ni samaki mtamu wa muhoni.
examples.en: Catfish is a tasty freshwater fish.
examples.sw: Kambale ni samaki mtamu wa mtoni.

senses.definition_dg: Phamwenga, kpwa phephi-phephi.

examples.en: The thief was followed closely
examples.sw: Mwizi alifungwa unyo ili asiweze kutoroka.

equivalents_sw: kufa kwa ajili ya imani fulani

senses.definition_sw: kufa kwa ajili ya imani fulani
senses.definition_dg: Kufwa kpwa sababu ya imani yako. Kukala shahidi.

examples.dg: Anji aluphala kpwa sababu ya imani yao.
examples.en: Many became martyrs because of their faith.
examples.sw: Wengi walikufa kwa ajili ya imani yao.

senses.definition_dg: Ngozi ya dzulu ya diso ambayo inafunika diso na kope za matso.

examples.en: My eyelid is swollen.
examples.sw: Ukope wa jicho langu umevimba.

senses.definition_dg: Ncha ya chitu ambacho chikachongwa na kukala kali.

examples.dg: Lutsa ra fimbo ni kali sana.
examples.en: The tip of the stick is very sharp.
examples.sw: Ncha ya fimbo ni kali sana.

senses.definition_dg: Mududu mdide anayeishi ardhini na kurya mihi.

examples.en: Work is not eaten by termites
examples.sw: Kazi hailiwa na mchwa — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kufungira na kufungulira nyumba. Mlango.

examples.en: Close the door before sleeping.
examples.sw: Funga mlango kabla ya kulala.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na madzi mwirini au nguoni, kuwa na unyevu.

examples.en: My clothes got wet from the rain.
examples.sw: Nguo zangu zikalowa kwa mvua.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya maduru-duru.

examples.dg: Lwambe-lwambe ni neno ranjina ra maduru-duru.
examples.en: Lwambe-lwambe is another word for maduru-duru (circles).
examples.sw: Lwambe-lwambe ni neno lingine la maduru-duru.

senses.definition_en: backbiting, being unable to keep a secret
senses.definition_dg: Kugomba mambo ga atu nyuma zao. Kukosa kushika siri.

examples.dg: Mutu wa lwambe-lwambe si msena wa kpweli.
examples.en: A person who gossips is not a true friend.
examples.sw: Mtu wa umbeya si rafiki wa kweli.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chikale na madzi, kulowesha.

examples.dg: Mvula ikalwamisa nguwo zosi za kondze.
examples.en: The rain made all the outside clothes wet.
examples.sw: Mvua ililoweza nguo zote za nje.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa makundi, chila kundi phakpwe.

examples.dg: Atu aphiya lwao, chila kundi kuphiya kpwao.
examples.en: The people went in groups, each group going to their own place.
examples.sw: Watu walienda makundi, kila kundi kwenda kwao.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala bila hela hata kidogo.

examples.dg: Rero ni lwe; sina hela hata mwenga.
examples.en: Today I am broke; I don't have even one shilling.
examples.sw: Leo ni mfilisi; sina hata shilingi moja.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiya chitu ndani ya madzi kpwa muda mure ili chilowe.

examples.dg: Lweka nguwo hizi madzini ili zisafe.
examples.en: Soak these clothes in water so they get clean.
examples.sw: Loweka nguo hizi majini ili zisafike.

equivalents_en: thin waist as compared to the whole body
equivalents_sw: sehemu nyembamba katikati ya nyonga na mbavu

senses.definition_en: thin waist as compared to the whole body
senses.definition_sw: sehemu nyembamba katikati ya nyonga na mbavu
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu nyembamba ya mwiri kahi ya nyonga na mbavu.

examples.en: That woman has a thin waist.
examples.sw: Mwanamke yule ana kiuno chembamba.

equivalents_en: hole dug in the ground as a trap

senses.definition_en: hole dug in the ground as a trap
senses.definition_dg: Shimo rinarochimbwa ardhini kpwa kunasira nyama. Sawa na lina.

examples.en: He dug a trap hole in the bush to catch animals.
examples.sw: Alichimba shimo porini kunasa wanyama.

equivalents_en: marry (used of a man marrying a woman)

senses.definition_en: to marry (used of a man marrying a woman)
senses.definition_dg: Mulume kuoa mchetu na kumhala kukala mkpwaziye.

examples.dg: Walóla mwari wa mudzi wa jirani.
examples.en: He married a girl from the neighbouring village.
examples.sw: Alioa msichana wa kijiji cha jirani.
